name: Task Orchestration System
description: Centralized task management, agent coordination, escalation, universal webhook-to-task automation, and a full web dashboard.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for all date operations (default: America/Toronto)

agentId.description: Agent ID to run scheduler cycles (configured during install)

checkIntervalMinutes.description: How often to check for stuck/overdue tasks (default: 5)

stuckThresholdMinutes.description: Minutes before in_progress task is considered stuck (default: 30)

deadlineWarningMinutes.description: Minutes before deadline to trigger warning (default: 30)

urgentCycleEnabled.description: Enable fast-track cycle for urgent (priority=1) tasks (default: true)

dispatch_cooldown_minutes.description: Minutes before re-dispatching the same task to an agent (default: 15)

priority_aging_minutes.description: Minutes a todo task waits before its priority is bumped one level higher (default: 60)

preemption_enabled.description: Allow higher-priority todo tasks to preempt lower-priority in_progress tasks (default: true)

wake_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for agent wake calls (default: 120)

unack_threshold_minutes.description: Minutes after dispatch before task is considered unacknowledged (default: 10)

max_dispatch_attempts.description: Number of dispatch attempts before escalation fires (default: 3)

escalation.description: Escalation defaults and human notification settings

default_timeout_minutes.description: Default time before a stuck/blocked task triggers an escalation (default: 30)

default_cooldown_minutes.description: Default minimum time between re-escalations for the same task (default: 30)

default_max_escalations.description: Default maximum escalations per task per rule (default: 3)

human_escalation_channel.description: Channel name for human escalation messages (e.g. voipms)

human_escalation_account.description: Channel account ID / DID to send from

human_escalation_target.description: Recipient identifier (phone number, chat ID, etc.)

human_working_hours_start.description: Start of human escalation window in HH:MM format (default: 08:00)

human_working_hours_end.description: End of human escalation window in HH:MM format (default: 17:00)

human_working_days.description: Days of week for human escalations (0=Sun..6=Sat, default: [1,2,3,4,5])

human_timezone.description: IANA timezone for human escalation schedule (default: America/Toronto)

scheduler_diagnostics.description: Include detailed diagnostics in scheduler_run_cycle output (default: false)

nudge.description: Agent nudge/reminder settings — gentle reminders before escalation

nudge_in_progress_minutes.description: Minutes before first nudge to agent with stuck in_progress task (default: 20)

nudge_blocked_minutes.description: Minutes before first nudge to supervisor for blocked task (default: 15)

nudge_blocked_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between repeat blocked nudges to supervisor (default: 15)

nudge_unstarted_minutes.description: Minutes after dispatch before nudging agent who hasn't started task (default: 10)

max_nudges.description: Maximum nudges per task before stopping (escalation takes over) (default: 5)

memory.description: Global memory system defaults (per-agent settings override these)

pattern_lookback_days.description: Days to look back for pattern detection (default: 7)

pattern_min_occurrences.description: Min occurrences to detect a pattern (default: 3)

max_active_observations.description: Cap on active observations per agent (default: 500)

tools.description: Tools to call during sensor sweep

agentPermissions.description: Per-agent permission groups. Keys are agent IDs, values are arrays of group names or aliases. Use '*' for default.
